name: bearded-media
description: AI Media Tools for WordPress. Features client-side optimization, vision-based auto-tagging, and generative editing.

scripts.test:php: composer format && composer analyze && composer test
scripts.test: npm run lint:js && npm run test:php
scripts.plugin-zip: npm run build && rm -rf dist-zip bearded-media.zip && mkdir -p dist-zip/bearded-media && rsync -a . dist-zip/bearded-media --exclude-from=.distignore --exclude='dist-zip' --exclude='bearded-media.zip' && (cd dist-zip && zip -r ../bearded-media.zip bearded-media) && rm -rf dist-zip
